creator: language.devel@gmail.com
text:
I think that's it. Assuming the package build server is reading from branch 2022Q2, it isn't seeing the latest commit.

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/databases/cassandra3/Makefile?h=2022Q2
31:  GH_TAGNAME=	84496b0

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/databases/cassandra3/Makefile
31:  GH_TAGNAME=	0150ddc

So I'll ignore the build failure messages until there's a merge.
